title: Killing in the Name
album: Rage Against The Machine - XX (20th Anniversary Special Edition)
why_this_song: Killing in the Name by Rage Against the Machine (1992) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "told" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "told" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "those" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "those" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And now you do what they told ya
Are the same that burn crosses

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Some of those that work forces
Now you do what they told ya

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Killing in the Name" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Killing in the Name"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Rage Against the Machine one question about "Killing in the Name", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Rage Against the Machine sobre "Killing in the Name", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Killing in the Name" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Killing in the Name" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Killing in the Name", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Killing in the Name", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Killing in the Name" was released in 1992. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Killing in the Name" foi lançada em 1992. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Killing in the Name" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Killing in the Name" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
